file.content:
# i18n: Estonian + Russian Landing Page + Celebrity Sample Horoscopes

```
task: i18n-landing
created: 2026-03-01
status: not_started
```

## Spec

### Goal

Add Estonian (ET) and Russian (RU) language versions of zodiacid.com as fully separate static HTML pages — SEO-optimized, crawlable, indexable by Google in each language independently. Fix all existing SEO gaps on EN pages (missing meta robots, og:locale, og:site_name, incomplete schemas). Proper `hreflang` annotations, per-language schema.org JSON-LD, per-language OG/meta tags, multi-language sitemap. Generate culturally relevant celebrity sample horoscopes per language. Minimal JS (same as current site — tabs, mobile nav, cookie consent only). All content baked into HTML.

### Why Now (Decision Principles check)

The landing page IS the revenue instrument. Adding RU/ET expands addressable audience to 3 markets. Estonian market has zero competition. Russian-speaking EU diaspora (Germany, Israel, Baltics, Czech Republic) is large. EN site is live — this is a conversion multiplier, not premature infrastructure.

### Hosting

Cloudflare Pages (static). Repo: `zodiacid/zodiacid.com`, remote `cf`. No build step, no server-side logic, no Workers. Deploy: `git push cf main`. Supports `_redirects` and `_headers` files natively.

### Architecture: EN at Root + Language Subdirectories (SEO-first)

**URL structure** (per ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0):
- EN = root (`zodiacid.com/*`) — **NO `/en/` prefix**
- RU = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/ru/*`)
- ET = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/et/*`)
- Same filenames across all languages
- Trailing slashes in URLs (CF Pages pretty URLs: `pricing.html` serves at `/pricing/`)

```
sites/zodiacid/
├── index.html                          # EN homepage (root = default)
├── pricing.html
├── sample.html
├── about.html
├── faq.html
├── contact.html
├── product-natal.html
├── product-synastry.html
├── product-parenting.html
├── product-redflag.html
├── privacy.html
├── terms.html
├── refund.html
├── 404.html
├── sample-natal-beyonce.html           # existing
├── sample-natal-taylor-swift.html      # NEW
├── sample-natal-freddie-mercury.html   # NEW
├── sample-synastry-lennon-ono.html     # existing
├── sample-parenting-prince-george.html # existing
├── sample-redflag-pitt-jolie.html      # existing
├── ru/                                 # Russian
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── pricing.html
│   ├── sample.html
│   ├── about.html
│   ├── faq.html
│   ├── contact.html
│   ├── product-natal.html
│   ├── product-synastry.html
│   ├── product-parenting.html
│   ├── product-redflag.html
│   ├── privacy.html
│   ├── terms.html
│   ├── refund.html
│   ├── 404.html
│   ├── sample-natal-tsoi.html
│   ├── sample-natal-pugacheva.html
│   └── sample-natal-vysotsky.html
├── et/                                 # Estonian
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── pricing.html
│   ├── sample.html
│   ├── about.html
│   ├── faq.html
│   ├── contact.html
│   ├── product-natal.html
│   ├── product-synastry.html
│   ├── product-parenting.html
│   ├── product-redflag.html
│   ├── privacy.html
│   ├── terms.html
│   ├── refund.html
│   ├── 404.html
│   ├── sample-natal-part.html
│   ├── sample-natal-ots.html
│   └── sample-natal-meri.html
├── css/styles.css                      # Shared (one copy)
├── js/main.js                          # Shared (minimal — tabs, nav, consent)
├── images/                             # Shared assets
├── sitemap.xml                         # Multi-language with hreflang
├── robots.txt
├── _headers                            # Cache + security headers
└── site.webmanifest                    # Referenced, needs verification
```

**Why separate files, not JS switching:**
1. Google indexes each language version independently — RU pages rank in Russian Google, ET pages in Estonian Google
2. Each page has its own `<html lang="ru">`, `<title>`, `<meta description>`, OG tags, schema.org — all in the correct language
3. Zero JS needed for content — pages load instantly, no flash of wrong language
4. Social sharing works: sharing `/ru/` shows Russian OG title/description in Telegram/VK
5. `hreflang` tells Google these are translations of each other — no duplicate content penalty
6. CF Pages serves them as plain static files — perfect cache, perfect performance

**Why EN at root, not /en/:**
1. Existing indexed URLs stay valid — zero redirect complexity, zero SEO risk
2. EN is x-default — root is the canonical location per Google's hreflang spec
3. Simpler architecture — only RU/ET need subdirectories
4. All existing bookmarks, backlinks, and Google index entries keep working

### Scope

**EN pages (19 in sitemap, 20 total):**
- Main: index, pricing, sample, about, faq, contact (6)
- Products: product-natal, product-synastry, product-parenting, product-redflag (4)
- Legal: privacy, terms, refund (3)
- Samples: 3 natal (Beyonce existing + Taylor Swift NEW + Freddie Mercury NEW), 1 synastry (Lennon-Ono), 1 parenting (Prince George), 1 red flag (Pitt-Jolie) (6)
- Error: 404 (1, noindex — not in sitemap)

**RU pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
- 3 celebrity natal samples (Tsoi, Pugacheva, Vysotsky)
- 404 (noindex)

**ET pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
- 3 celebrity natal samples (Part, Ots, Meri)
- 404 (noindex)

**Totals:** 51 URLs in sitemap (19 EN + 16 RU + 16 ET). 54 HTML files on disk.

**Shared assets (one copy, all languages link to same):** css/styles.css, js/main.js, images/*

**New/updated infrastructure:** sitemap.xml (rewrite with hreflang), _headers (create), robots.txt (update), site.webmanifest (verify)

### Content Decisions

| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| Sample word count | 400-600 words per celebrity excerpt on sample.html; full reports as separate HTML pages | Matches existing format |
| Sample display | Tab/card selector (existing pattern on sample.html) | Clean UX, existing JS handles tabs |
| Celebrity selection | Culturally specific per language | RU/ET visitors need familiar faces |
| Astrological accuracy | Full verification from Wikipedia birth data | Astrology-literate visitors will catch errors |
| Estonian register | Informal "sina" throughout | Matches personal astrology tone |
| Birth times | Prefer documented; noon chart with disclosure if unavailable | Standard astrology practice |
| Language switcher | Plain `<a>` links with `hreflang`/`lang`/`aria-label` attrs (no flags, no JS) | SEO-crawlable, politically neutral, accessible |
| Internal links | All links within a language version stay in that language (`/ru/pricing/` links to `/ru/product-natal/`) | User stays in their language |
| Price format | "EUR 34.90" consistent across all languages | EUR universal, no locale-specific currency symbols |
| Date formats | EN "December 13, 1989" / RU "13 декабря 1989" / ET "13. detsember 1989" | Native conventions per language |

### Celebrity Candidates

**English (keep existing Beyonce + add 2):**
- Beyonce (existing full report) — Sep 4 1981, Houston TX, birth time documented
- Taylor Swift — Dec 13 1989, West Reading PA, birth time documented
- Freddie Mercury — Sep 5 1946, Stone Town Zanzibar, birth time documented
- Lady Gaga — Mar 28 1986, New York, birth time documented (backup)

**Russian (3):**
- Виктор Цой — Jun 21 1962, Leningrad, birth time documented
- Алла Пугачёва — Apr 15 1949, Moscow, birth time may be available
- Владимир Высоцкий — Jan 25 1938, Moscow, birth time documented
- Земфира — Aug 26 1976, Ufa (backup)
- Булгаков — May 15 1891, Kyiv (backup)

**Estonian (3):**
- Arvo Part — Sep 11 1935, Paide, birth time uncertain (noon chart)
- Georg Ots — Mar 21 1920, Petrograd, birth time uncertain (noon chart)
- Lennart Meri — Mar 29 1929, Tallinn, birth time may be available
- Ott Tanak — Oct 15 1987, Karnku (backup)
- Kersti Kaljulaid — Dec 30 1969, Tartu (backup)

### Translation Quality Requirements

- **RU:** Native-level. "Солнце в Стрельце" not "Солнце в знаке Стрелец". Proper name declension. No Google Translate.
- **ET:** Native-level. Informal "sina". Estonian astrology terms. Date format: "11. september 1935".
- **EN:** Existing copy stays. Professional but warm.

### Zodiac Sign Reference

| EN | RU | ET |
|----|----|----|
| Aries | Овен | Jaar |
| Taurus | Телец | Sonn |
| Gemini | Близнецы | Kaksikud |
| Cancer | Рак | Vahk |
| Leo | Лев | Lovi |
| Virgo | Дева | Neitsi |
| Libra | Весы | Kaalud |
| Scorpio | Скорпион | Skorpion |
| Sagittarius | Стрелец | Ambur |
| Capricorn | Козерог | Kaljukits |
| Aquarius | Водолей | Vesimees |
| Pisces | Рыбы | Kalad |

### SEO Specification

Full SEO rules from ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0 (2026-03-01). All Wikidata IDs verified same date.

#### 0. Current State Audit

##### 0.1 Page Inventory (18 HTML files)

| Page | URL | Schema Present | Schema Missing |
|------|-----|----------------|----------------|
| Homepage | `/` (index.html) | WebSite, Organization, FAQPage (8 Qs) | — |
| Pricing | `/pricing/` | OfferCatalog (3 products), BreadcrumbList | — |
| Product: Natal | `/product-natal/` | Product, FAQPage (4 Qs), BreadcrumbList | image, inLanguage |
| Product: Synastry | `/product-synastry/` | Product, FAQPage (3 Qs), BreadcrumbList | image, inLanguage |
| Product: Parenting | `/product-parenting/` | Product, BreadcrumbList | **FAQPage** (page has 3 visible FAQ Qs but no schema), image, inLanguage |
| Product: Red Flag | `/product-redflag/` | Product, BreadcrumbList | **FAQPage** (page has 3 visible FAQ Qs but no schema), image, inLanguage |
| Samples Hub | `/sample/` | ItemList (3 items), BreadcrumbList | 4th item (Red Flag) missing from ItemList |
| Sample: Beyonce | `/sample-natal-beyonce/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| Sample: Lennon-Ono | `/sample-synastry-lennon-ono/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| Sample: Pitt-Jolie | `/sample-redflag-pitt-jolie/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| Sample: Prince George | `/sample-parenting-prince-george/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
| About | `/about/` | AboutPage, BreadcrumbList | — |
| FAQ | `/faq/` | FAQPage (16 Qs), BreadcrumbList | — |
| Contact | `/contact/` | BreadcrumbList | ContactPage schema |
| Privacy | `/privacy/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
| Terms | `/terms/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
| Refund | `/refund/` | BreadcrumbList | — |
| 404 | `/404.html` | BreadcrumbList | Should have NO schema; remove BreadcrumbList |

##### 0.2 Sitewide Missing Elements

Every page is currently missing:
- `<meta name="robots" content="...">`
- `<meta property="og:locale" content="...">`
- `<meta property="og:site_name" content="ZodiacID">`
- Product-specific OG images (all pages share `images/og-image.png`)

##### 0.3 Infrastructure Files

| File | Exists | Issues |
|------|--------|--------|
| `robots.txt` | Yes | Missing `Disallow: /api/` |
| `sitemap.xml` | Yes | Missing hreflang, missing product-redflag/, missing sample-redflag-pitt-jolie/ |
| `_headers` | **No** | Needed for security headers + cache control |
| `_redirects` | **No** | Not needed currently |
| `site.webmanifest` | Referenced | Not verified |

##### 0.4 Known Content Inconsistencies

- `about/` visible text says "Founded by Sergei Tkatshenko" but schema says `founder.name: "Vadik Iljin"` — **Sergei Tkatshenko is authoritative**, remove Vadik Iljin from schema
- Product pages use `Brand` type for brand — should be `Organization` for richer data
- 404.html has canonical URL and BreadcrumbList — should have neither

#### 1. Critical Defaults (every page)

##### 1.1 Meta Robots

```html
<!-- PUBLIC pages -->
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow, max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large, max-video-preview:-1">

<!-- NOINDEX pages (404, future checkout/thank-you) -->
<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
```

- `max-snippet:-1` — unlimited text extraction for AI Overviews and featured snippets
- `max-image-preview:large` — large image previews in Discover and image search
- 404.html MUST be noindex

##### 1.2 Canonical URLs

Self-referencing canonical on every page. Always HTTPS, never include query params.

```html
<link rel="canonical" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
```

- EN pages: `https://zodiacid.com/{page}/`
- RU pages: `https://zodiacid.com/ru/{page}/`
- ET pages: `https://zodiacid.com/et/{page}/`
- Homepage: `https://zodiacid.com/` | `https://zodiacid.com/ru/` | `https://zodiacid.com/et/`
- 404.html: NO canonical (it's an error page)

##### 1.3 Hreflang Tags

All 3 language versions present on every page, including self-reference. EN = x-default.

```html
<!-- On zodiacid.com/pricing/ -->
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">

<!-- On zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/ — SAME set, identical URLs -->
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
```

Rules:
- Bidirectional (if A points to B, B must point back to A)
- x-default = EN at root
- ISO 639-1 codes only: `en`, `ru`, `et` (no region codes like `en-US`)
- Every page in every language has ALL hreflang tags including self
- 404.html: NO hreflang tags

##### 1.4 HTML Lang Attribute

```html
<html lang="en">   <!-- Root EN pages -->
<html lang="ru">   <!-- /ru/ pages -->
<html lang="et">   <!-- /et/ pages -->
```

##### 1.5 Charset and Viewport

```html
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
```

UTF-8 is critical for Estonian (a, o, u, o) and Russian (Cyrillic).

#### 2. Title Tags and Meta Descriptions

##### 2.1 Title Tag Rules

- Max 60 characters (Google truncates after ~60)
- Primary keyword near the beginning
- Brand at end: `| ZodiacID` or `— ... | ZodiacID`
- Every title unique across entire site (including across languages)

**Current Page Titles (EN):**

| Page | Title |
|------|-------|
| Home | `ZodiacID — Your Personal Astrological Portrait` |
| Pricing | `Reports & Pricing | ZodiacID` |
| Natal | `Your User Manual — Personal Birth Chart Report | EUR 34.90 | ZodiacID` |
| Synastry | `Relationship X-Ray — Compatibility Report | EUR 24.90 | ZodiacID` |
| Parenting | `Parenting Guide — Child's Birth Chart Report | EUR 24.90 | ZodiacID` |
| Red Flag | `Red Flag Check — Relationship Friction Analysis | EUR 3.90 | ZodiacID` |
| Samples | `Sample Reports | ZodiacID` |
| Sample: Beyonce | `Beyonce Birth Chart Analysis — Sample Natal Report | ZodiacID` |
| Sample: Lennon-Ono | `Lennon & Ono Compatibility — Sample Synastry Report | ZodiacID` |
| Sample: Pitt-Jolie | `Pitt & Jolie Red Flag Check — Sample Relationship Report | ZodiacID` |
| Sample: George | `Prince George Parenting Guide — Sample Child Report | ZodiacID` |
| About | `About ZodiacID` |
| FAQ | `Frequently Asked Questions | ZodiacID` |
| Contact | `Contact ZodiacID — Tallinn, Estonia` |
| Privacy | `Privacy Policy — ZodiacID` |
| Terms | `Terms of Service — ZodiacID` |
| Refund | `Refund Policy — ZodiacID` |
| 404 | `Page Not Found — ZodiacID` |

**RU/ET Title Formulas:**

| Page | RU | ET |
|------|----|-----|
| Home | `ZodiacID — Ваш Персональный Астрологический Портрет` | `ZodiacID — Sinu Isiklik Astroloogiline Portree` |
| Pricing | `Отчёты и цены \| ZodiacID` | `Raportid ja hinnad \| ZodiacID` |
| Natal | `Ваше Руководство — Натальный Отчёт \| EUR 34.90 \| ZodiacID` | `Sinu Kasiraamat — Sunnikaardi Raport \| EUR 34.90 \| ZodiacID` |
| Synastry | `Рентген Отношений — Совместимость \| EUR 24.90 \| ZodiacID` | `Suhte Rontgen — Sobivusraport \| EUR 24.90 \| ZodiacID` |
| Parenting | `Для Родителей — Натальная Карта Ребёнка \| EUR 24.90 \| ZodiacID` | `Lapsevanema Juhend — Lapse Sunnikaart \| EUR 24.90 \| ZodiacID` |
| Red Flag | `Проверка на Red Flag — Анализ Трений \| EUR 3.90 \| ZodiacID` | `Red Flag Kontroll — Suhte Erinevuste Analuus \| EUR 3.90 \| ZodiacID` |
| FAQ | `Вопросы и ответы \| ZodiacID` | `Kusimused ja vastused \| ZodiacID` |
| About | `О ZodiacID` | `ZodiacID-st` |
| Contact | `Контакты \| ZodiacID` | `Kontakt \| ZodiacID` |
| Samples | `Примеры отчётов \| ZodiacID` | `Naidisraportid \| ZodiacID` |
| Privacy | `Политика конфиденциальности — ZodiacID` | `Privaatsuspoliitika — ZodiacID` |
| Terms | `Условия использования — ZodiacID` | `Kasutustingimused — ZodiacID` |
| Refund | `Политика возврата — ZodiacID` | `Tagastuspoliitika — ZodiacID` |
| 404 | `Страница не найдена — ZodiacID` | `Lehte ei leitud — ZodiacID` |

**Future Content Hub Titles:**

| Type | Formula | Example |
|------|---------|---------|
| Sign Hub | `{Sign}: Complete Zodiac Guide — Traits, Dates & Compatibility` | `Aries: Complete Zodiac Guide — Traits, Dates & Compatibility` |
| Birthday | `{Month} {Day} Zodiac Sign: {Sign} Personality & Traits` | `March 14 Zodiac Sign: Pisces Personality & Traits` |
| Compatibility | `{Sign1} and {Sign2} Compatibility: Love & Relationship` | `Aries and Leo Compatibility: Love & Relationship` |

##### 2.2 Meta Description Rules

150-160 characters. Include value proposition or CTA. Unique per page per language.

| Page | EN Description |
|------|---------------|
| Home | `40+ page personality report based on your exact birth data. 20 celestial bodies, 50+ aspects, Swiss Ephemeris precision. Get your astrological user manual.` |
| Pricing | `Choose your astrological report: User Manual (EUR 34.90), Relationship X-Ray (EUR 24.90), or Parenting Guide (EUR 24.90). Delivered within 24 hours.` |
| Natal | `40+ page natal chart report covering personality, emotions, love, career and 9 more life areas. Based on 20 celestial bodies at your exact birth time. EUR 34.90.` |
| Synastry | `Full zodiac compatibility report for two birth charts. Love chemistry, communication, conflict triggers, growth areas. EUR 24.90.` |
| Parenting | `Understand your child through their birth chart. Emotional needs, learning style, natural talents, challenges. Written for parents. EUR 24.90.` |
| Red Flag | `Top 5 reasons you'll fight, plus survival scripts. Brutally honest relationship friction analysis. EUR 3.90.` |
| Samples | `Read real ZodiacID reports generated for celebrities. See the depth and precision before you order your own.` |
| FAQ | `Answers to common questions about ZodiacID reports: what you get, how it works, birth time requirements, delivery, and refunds.` |

RU/ET descriptions: write natively per language — NOT translations.

#### 3. Schema Markup (JSON-LD)

##### 3.1 Schema Status (as of March 2026)

**Rich results fully supported:**
- Product + Offer (product pages) — stars, price, availability in SERPs
- BreadcrumbList (all pages) — breadcrumb trail in SERPs
- Organization (sitewide) — Knowledge Panel, brand entity
- WebSite (homepage) — sitelinks
- Article (content pages) — date, author, headline in SERPs

**Restricted but still useful for AI Overviews:**
- FAQPage — rich results restricted to authoritative govt/health sites since Aug 2023. Still useful for AI systems and Google's internal understanding. Keep using it.
- HowTo — visual rich results removed Sept 2023. Don't add new ones.

**Do NOT use until criteria met:**
- AggregateRating — requires real, verifiable reviews. Fake reviews = Google manual action.
- Review — same as above.

##### 3.2 Homepage Schema (index.html)

**WebSite:**
```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "WebSite",
  "name": "ZodiacID",
  "url": "https://zodiacid.com",
  "description": "In-depth natal chart reports and zodiac compatibility analysis. Birth chart readings covering personality traits, love compatibility, and life patterns.",
  "publisher": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "ZodiacID",
    "url": "https://zodiacid.com"
  },
  "inLanguage": ["en", "ru", "et"]
}
```

No `potentialAction` / `SearchAction` — site has no search functionality.

**Organization:**
```json
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Organization",
  "name": "ZodiacID",
  "url": "https://zodiacid.com",
  "logo": "https://zodiacid.com/images/og-image.png",
  "email": "contact@zodiacid.com",
  "description": "Natal chart reports and zodiac compatibility analysis based on astronomical calculations from Astrolog 7.80.",
  "founder": {
    "@type": "Person",
    "name": "Sergei Tkatshenko"
  },
  "address": {
    "@type": "PostalAddress",
    "addressLocality": "Tallinn",
    "addressCountry": "EE"
  },
  "contactPoint": {
    "@type": "ContactPoint",
    "email": "contact@zodiacid.com",
    "contactType": "customer service",
    "availableLanguage": ["en", "ru", "et"]
  },
  "sameAs": [
    "https://vadikiljin.substack.com"
  ],
  "knowsAbout": [
    "Natal Chart",
    "Birth Chart",
    "Zodiac Signs",
    "Zodiac Compatibility",
    "Synastry",
    "Astrology"
  ]
}
```

##### 5.4 CF Pages Headers (_headers file)

Create `_headers` in site root:

```
/*
  X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
  Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
  Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()

/css/*
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable

/js/*
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable

/images/*
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable

/*.html
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600, must-revalidate

/ru/*.html
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600, must-revalidate

/et/*.html
  Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600, must-revalidate
```

##### 5.5 Core Web Vitals

Thresholds:
- LCP (Largest Contentful Paint): < 2.5s
- INP (Interaction to Next Paint): < 200ms
- CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift): < 0.1

Static HTML on CF CDN should pass easily. Watch for:
- Unoptimized images — use WebP + `<picture>` fallback (already done on product pages)
- Render-blocking JS — `defer` non-critical scripts (main.js already deferred on sample pages, not on others)
- Font loading flash — use `font-display: swap` (Google Fonts handles this via `&display=swap`)
- CLS from late-loading elements — always set `width` and `height` on images

```html
<!-- Above fold: eager, high priority -->
<img src="hero.webp" alt="..." width="800" height="450" loading="eager" fetchpriority="high">

<!-- Below fold: lazy -->
<img src="chart.webp" alt="..." width="600" height="400" loading="lazy">
```

##### 5.6 Internal Linking

Within a language version, ALL internal links stay in that language:
- `/ru/pricing/` links to `/ru/product-natal/` (never to `/product-natal/`)
- Root EN pages link to other root pages (no prefix)
- Language switcher is the ONLY cross-language link

Language switcher — plain `<a>` tags, no JS:
```html
<!-- On /ru/pricing/ -->
<nav class="lang-switcher" aria-label="Language">
  <a href="/pricing/" hreflang="en" lang="en">English</a>
  <span class="active" aria-current="true">Русский</span>
  <a href="/et/pricing/" hreflang="et" lang="et">Eesti</a>
</nav>

<!-- On /pricing/ (EN root) -->
<nav class="lang-switcher" aria-label="Language">
  <span class="active" aria-current="true">English</span>
  <a href="/ru/pricing/" hreflang="ru" lang="ru">Русский</a>
  <a href="/et/pricing/" hreflang="et" lang="et">Eesti</a>
</nav>
```

#### 6. Content SEO

##### 6.1 Heading Hierarchy

One H1 per page. No skipping levels.

```
H1: Primary keyword (one per page)
  H2: Major sections
    H3: Subsections
```

##### 6.2 Image SEO

```html
<!-- Good: descriptive, specific -->
<img alt="Beyonce natal chart wheel showing Virgo Sun and Scorpio Moon">
<img alt="Brad Pitt and Angelina Jolie synastry biwheel — Sagittarius Sun and Gemini Sun relationship chart">

<!-- Bad: keyword stuffed -->
<img alt="chart image zodiac astrology horoscope natal">

<!-- Decorative only -->
<img alt="" aria-hidden="true">
```

All images MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height` attributes.
Use `aria-hidden="true"` for purely decorative images (like the 404 background wheel).

##### 6.3 Content Freshness

- `datePublished` in Article schema: set once, never change
- `dateModified`: update when content meaningfully changes
- `lastmod` in sitemap: actual last modification date

##### 6.4 AI Overview Optimization

1. Clear, direct opening sentences answering the query. No preamble.
2. Semantic HTML (H2/H3 matching common search queries).
3. Specific data: planetary positions, degree numbers, exact counts (20 celestial bodies, 50+ aspects).
4. `sameAs` Wikidata links in schema — helps AI disambiguate entities.
5. Short paragraphs (2-3 sentences). AI extracts paragraph-level chunks.
6. Never mention "AI" in public content or meta tags.

##### 6.5 Entertainment Disclaimer

Every page footer currently has: "For entertainment and self-reflection purposes only. Not a substitute for professional, medical, legal, or financial advice."

This MUST be present on every page across all languages. Translate natively for RU/ET.

- Same filenames across all languages
- Each language is a complete, standalone set of HTML files

##### 8.2 Per-Language Content Rules

- ALL visible text in page language — zero mixing
- RU/ET content is written natively, NOT translated from English
- Brand name "ZodiacID" stays in Latin everywhere
- Prices always in EUR with "EUR" prefix (not $ or the euro sign in different formats)

##### 8.3 Per-Language Schema Rules

- Every JSON-LD block must have `"inLanguage": "{lang}"` where applicable
- All text fields (name, description, question, answer) in page language
- URLs point to the language-specific page
- `sameAs` Wikidata links stay identical (language-neutral)
- BreadcrumbList: translate `name` values, use localized URLs

##### 8.4 Per-Language Meta Rules

- `<html lang="{lang}">` matches content language
- `<title>` in page language
- `<meta name="description">` in page language
- All OG title/description in page language
- `og:locale` matches: `en_US`, `ru_RU`, `et_EE`
- `og:url` points to the localized URL

#### 9. SEO Validation Checklist

##### Pre-Launch (every new page or language version)

**Structure:**
- [ ] Unique `<title>` (no duplicates across entire site including all languages)
- [ ] Unique `<meta name="description">`
- [ ] Self-referencing `<link rel="canonical">`
- [ ] `<meta name="robots">` present
- [ ] Correct `<html lang="">` attribute
- [ ] Semantic H1 > H2 > H3 hierarchy, one H1 per page

**Hreflang:**
- [ ] All 4 hreflang tags present (en, ru, et, x-default)
- [ ] Tags are bidirectional across all 3 language versions
- [ ] x-default points to EN root version
- [ ] URLs in hreflang match actual file paths

**Schema:**
- [ ] JSON-LD validates in Google Rich Results Test
- [ ] Product schema has all fields (price, availability, returnPolicy, deliveryLeadTime)
- [ ] Article schema has datePublished, inLanguage, author, publisher with logo
- [ ] FAQPage schema matches visible FAQ content exactly
- [ ] `inLanguage` present on all content schemas
- [ ] No schema on 404.html

**Open Graph:**
- [ ] og:title, og:description in page language
- [ ] og:image with absolute URL
- [ ] og:url matches canonical
- [ ] og:site_name = "ZodiacID"
- [ ] og:locale matches page language
- [ ] Test: paste URL in Telegram — correct language title/description shown

**Technical:**
- [ ] sitemap.xml includes all public pages with hreflang
- [ ] robots.txt allows crawling of all public pages
- [ ] No mixed content (HTTP on HTTPS)
- [ ] 404.html returns 404 status code (not 200)
- [ ] All images have `alt`, `width`, `height`
- [ ] No orphan pages (every page reachable via internal link)
- [ ] Core Web Vitals pass (PageSpeed Insights)

**I18N:**
- [ ] All internal links within RU pages point to /ru/ paths
- [ ] All internal links within ET pages point to /et/ paths
- [ ] EN internal links use root paths (no prefix)
- [ ] Language switcher links to correct equivalent page
- [ ] No English text visible on RU/ET pages (except brand name)
- [ ] Product prices match across all languages
- [ ] Disclaimer in footer translated for each language

##### Post-Launch (weekly for 4 weeks)

- [ ] Google Search Console: no crawl errors
- [ ] Google Search Console: pages indexed vs submitted per language
- [ ] Google Search Console: no manual actions
- [ ] Hreflang audit (Screaming Frog or Ahrefs)

##### Monthly

- [ ] Schema validation after content updates
- [ ] Dead link check
- [ ] Verify RU/ET pages indexed (`site:zodiacid.com/ru/`, `site:zodiacid.com/et/`)
- [ ] `priceValidUntil` in Product schema not expired

### Risks

1. Bad translations = worse than no translation. Native speakers must QA.
2. Celebrity birth time disputes — some celebs have unverified times.
3. Russian language on EU site may attract sanctioned-jurisdiction traffic. Payment processor handles geo-blocking.
4. 3x maintenance burden — every content change needs 3 files updated.
5. Celebrity samples could be seen as endorsement — use "sample analysis" framing.

### Kill Criteria

1. EN landing page isn't live yet -> ship EN first. (Currently live — proceed.)
2. No validated birth data for 2+ celebrities in any language -> reduce that language's scope.
3. Total site size exceeds CF Pages free tier limits.

Note on hreflang for celebrity samples: since celebrities are language-specific (not translations), each page only has hreflang for its own language + x-default. This is correct per Google's hreflang spec — hreflang should only reference actual translations.

     8→     8→
     9→     9→## Spec
    10→    10→
    11→    11→### Goal
    12→    12→
    13→    13→Add Estonian (ET) and Russian (RU) language versions of zodiacid.com as fully separate static HTML pages — SEO-optimized, crawlable, indexable by Google in each language independently. Fix all existing SEO gaps on EN pages (missing meta robots, og:locale, og:site_name, incomplete schemas). Proper `hreflang` annotations, per-language schema.org JSON-LD, per-language OG/meta tags, multi-language sitemap. Generate culturally relevant celebrity sample horoscopes per language. Minimal JS (same as current site — tabs, mobile nav, cookie consent only). All content baked into HTML.
    14→    14→
    15→    15→### Why Now (Decision Principles check)
    16→    16→
    17→    17→The landing page IS the revenue instrument. Adding RU/ET expands addressable audience to 3 markets. Estonian market has zero competition. Russian-speaking EU diaspora (Germany, Israel, Baltics, Czech Republic) is large. EN site is live — this is a conversion multiplier, not premature infrastructure.
    18→    18→
    19→    19→### Hosting
    20→    20→
    21→    21→Cloudflare Pages (static). Repo: `zodiacid/zodiacid.com`, remote `cf`. No build step, no server-side logic, no Workers. Deploy: `git push cf main`. Supports `_redirects` and `_headers` files natively.
    22→    22→
    23→    23→### Architecture: EN at Root + Language Subdirectories (SEO-first)
    24→    24→
    25→    25→**URL structure** (per ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0):
    26→    26→- EN = root (`zodiacid.com/*`) — **NO `/en/` prefix**
    27→    27→- RU = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/ru/*`)
    28→    28→- ET = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/et/*`)
    29→    29→- Same filenames across all languages
    30→    30→- Trailing slashes in URLs (CF Pages pretty URLs: `pricing.html` serves at `/pricing/`)

    32→    32→```

    98→    98→
    99→    99→**Why separate files, not JS switching:**
   100→   100→1. Google indexes each language version independently — RU pages rank in Russian Google, ET pages in Estonian Google
   101→   101→2. Each page has its own `<html lang="ru">`, `<title>`, `<meta description>`, OG tags, schema.org — all in the correct language
   102→   102→3. Zero JS needed for content — pages load instantly, no flash of wrong language
   103→   103→4. Social sharing works: sharing `/ru/` shows Russian OG title/description in Telegram/VK
   104→   104→5. `hreflang` tells Google these are translations of each other — no duplicate content penalty
   105→   105→6. CF Pages serves them as plain static files — perfect cache, perfect performance
   106→   106→
   107→   107→**Why EN at root, not /en/:**
   108→   108→1. Existing indexed URLs stay valid — zero redirect complexity, zero SEO risk
   109→   109→2. EN is x-default — root is the canonical location per Google's hreflang spec
   110→   110→3. Simpler architecture — only RU/ET need subdirectories
   111→   111→4. All existing bookmarks, backlinks, and Google index entries keep working
   112→   112→
   113→   113→### Scope
   114→   114→
   115→   115→**EN pages (19 in sitemap, 20 total):**
   116→   116→- Main: index, pricing, sample, about, faq, contact (6)
   117→   117→- Products: product-natal, product-synastry, product-parenting, product-redflag (4)
   118→   118→- Legal: privacy, terms, refund (3)
   119→   119→- Samples: 3 natal (Beyonce existing + Taylor Swift NEW + Freddie Mercury NEW), 1 synastry (Lennon-Ono), 1 parenting (Prince George), 1 red flag (Pitt-Jolie) (6)
   120→   120→- Error: 404 (1, noindex — not in sitemap)
   121→   121→
   122→   122→**RU pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
   123→   123→- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
   124→   124→- 3 celebrity natal samples (Tsoi, Pugacheva, Vysotsky)
   125→   125→- 404 (noindex)
   126→   126→
   127→   127→**ET pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
   128→   128→- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
   129→   129→- 3 celebrity natal samples (Part, Ots, Meri)
   130→   130→- 404 (noindex)
   131→   131→
   132→   132→**Totals:** 51 URLs in sitemap (19 EN + 16 RU + 16 ET). 54 HTML files on disk.
   133→   133→
   134→   134→**Shared assets (one copy, all languages link to same):** css/styles.css, js/main.js, images/*
   135→   135→
   136→   136→**New/updated infrastructure:** sitemap.xml (rewrite with hreflang), _headers (create), robots.txt (update), site.webmanifest (verify)
   137→   137→
   138→   138→### Content Decisions
   139→   139→
   140→   140→| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
   141→   141→|----------|--------|-----------|
   142→   142→| Sample word count | 400-600 words per celebrity excerpt on sample.html; full reports as separate HTML pages | Matches existing format |
   143→   143→| Sample display | Tab/card selector (existing pattern on sample.html) | Clean UX, existing JS handles tabs |
   144→   144→| Celebrity selection | Culturally specific per language | RU/ET visitors need familiar faces |
   145→   145→| Astrological accuracy | Full verification from Wikipedia birth data | Astrology-literate visitors will catch errors |
   146→   146→| Estonian register | Informal "sina" throughout | Matches personal astrology tone |
   147→   147→| Birth times | Prefer documented; noon chart with disclosure if unavailable | Standard astrology practice |
   148→   148→| Language switcher | Plain `<a>` links with `hreflang`/`lang`/`aria-label` attrs (no flags, no JS) | SEO-crawlable, politically neutral, accessible |
   149→   149→| Internal links | All links within a language version stay in that language (`/ru/pricing/` links to `/ru/product-natal/`) | User stays in their language |
   150→   150→| Price format | "EUR 34.90" consistent across all languages | EUR universal, no locale-specific currency symbols |
   151→   151→| Date formats | EN "December 13, 1989" / RU "13 декабря 1989" / ET "13. detsember 1989" | Native conventions per language |
   152→   152→

   174→   174→
   175→   175→### Translation Quality Requirements
   176→   176→
   177→   177→- **RU:** Native-level. "Солнце в Стрельце" not "Солнце в знаке Стрелец". Proper name declension. No Google Translate.

   201→   201→
   202→   202→#### 0. Current State Audit
   203→   203→
   204→   204→##### 0.1 Page Inventory (18 HTML files)
   205→   205→

   226→   226→
   227→   227→##### 0.2 Sitewide Missing Elements
   228→   228→
   229→   229→Every page is currently missing:
   230→   230→- `<meta name="robots" content="...">`
   231→   231→- `<meta property="og:locale" content="...">`

   234→   234→

   244→   244→
   245→   245→##### 0.4 Known Content Inconsistencies
   246→   246→
   247→   247→- `about/` visible text says "Founded by Sergei Tkatshenko" but schema says `founder.name: "Vadik Iljin"` — **Sergei Tkatshenko is authoritative**, remove Vadik Iljin from schema
   248→   248→- Product pages use `Brand` type for brand — should be `Organization` for richer data
   249→   249→- 404.html has canonical URL and BreadcrumbList — should have neither
   250→   250→
   251→   251→#### 1. Critical Defaults (every page)
   252→   252→
   253→   253→##### 1.1 Meta Robots
   254→   254→
   255→   255→```html
   256→   256→<!-- PUBLIC pages -->
   257→   257→<meta name="robots" content="index, follow, max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large, max-video-preview:-1">
   258→   258→
   259→   259→<!-- NOINDEX pages (404, future checkout/thank-you) -->

   261→   261→```
   262→   262→
   263→   263→- `max-snippet:-1` — unlimited text extraction for AI Overviews and featured snippets
   264→   264→- `max-image-preview:large` — large image previews in Discover and image search
   265→   265→- 404.html MUST be noindex
   266→   266→
   267→   267→##### 1.2 Canonical URLs
   268→   268→
   269→   269→Self-referencing canonical on every page. Always HTTPS, never include query params.
   270→   270→
   271→   271→```html
   272→   272→<link rel="canonical" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   273→   273→```
   274→   274→
   275→   275→- EN pages: `https://zodiacid.com/{page}/`
   276→   276→- RU pages: `https://zodiacid.com/ru/{page}/`
   277→   277→- ET pages: `https://zodiacid.com/et/{page}/`
   278→   278→- Homepage: `https://zodiacid.com/` | `https://zodiacid.com/ru/` | `https://zodiacid.com/et/`
   279→   279→- 404.html: NO canonical (it's an error page)
   280→   280→
   281→   281→##### 1.3 Hreflang Tags
   282→   282→
   283→   283→All 3 language versions present on every page, including self-reference. EN = x-default.
   284→   284→
   285→   285→```html
   286→   286→<!-- On zodiacid.com/pricing/ -->
   287→   287→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   288→   288→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
   289→   289→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
   290→   290→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   291→   291→
   292→   292→<!-- On zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/ — SAME set, identical URLs -->
   293→   293→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   294→   294→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
   295→   295→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
   296→   296→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   297→   297→```
   298→   298→
   299→   299→Rules:
   300→   300→- Bidirectional (if A points to B, B must point back to A)

    26→- EN = root (`zodiacid.com/*`) — **NO `/en/` prefix**
    27→- RU = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/ru/*`)
    28→- ET = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/et/*`)
    29→- Same filenames across all languages
    30→- Trailing slashes in URLs (CF Pages pretty URLs: `pricing.html` serves at `/pricing/`)
    31→
    32→```
    33→sites/zodiacid/
    34→├── index.html                          # EN homepage (root = default)
    35→├── pricing.html
    36→├── sample.html
    37→├── about.html

    97→```
    98→
    99→**Why separate files, not JS switching:**
   100→1. Google indexes each language version independently — RU pages rank in Russian Google, ET pages in Estonian Google
   101→2. Each page has its own `<html lang="ru">`, `<title>`, `<meta description>`, OG tags, schema.org — all in the correct language
   102→3. Zero JS needed for content — pages load instantly, no flash of wrong language
   103→4. Social sharing works: sharing `/ru/` shows Russian OG title/description in Telegram/VK
   104→5. `hreflang` tells Google these are translations of each other — no duplicate content penalty
   105→6. CF Pages serves them as plain static files — perfect cache, perfect performance
   106→
   107→**Why EN at root, not /en/:**
   108→1. Existing indexed URLs stay valid — zero redirect complexity, zero SEO risk
   109→2. EN is x-default — root is the canonical location per Google's hreflang spec
   110→3. Simpler architecture — only RU/ET need subdirectories
   111→4. All existing bookmarks, backlinks, and Google index entries keep working
   112→
   113→### Scope
   114→
   115→**EN pages (19 in sitemap, 20 total):**
   116→- Main: index, pricing, sample, about, faq, contact (6)
   117→- Products: product-natal, product-synastry, product-parenting, product-redflag (4)
   118→- Legal: privacy, terms, refund (3)
   119→- Samples: 3 natal (Beyonce existing + Taylor Swift NEW + Freddie Mercury NEW), 1 synastry (Lennon-Ono), 1 parenting (Prince George), 1 red flag (Pitt-Jolie) (6)
   120→- Error: 404 (1, noindex — not in sitemap)
   121→
   122→**RU pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
   123→- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
   124→- 3 celebrity natal samples (Tsoi, Pugacheva, Vysotsky)
   125→- 404 (noindex)
   126→
   127→**ET pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
   128→- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
   129→- 3 celebrity natal samples (Part, Ots, Meri)
   130→- 404 (noindex)
   131→
   132→**Totals:** 51 URLs in sitemap (19 EN + 16 RU + 16 ET). 54 HTML files on disk.
   133→
   134→**Shared assets (one copy, all languages link to same):** css/styles.css, js/main.js, images/*
   135→
   136→**New/updated infrastructure:** sitemap.xml (rewrite with hreflang), _headers (create), robots.txt (update), site.webmanifest (verify)
   137→
   138→### Content Decisions
   139→
   140→| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
   141→|----------|--------|-----------|
   142→| Sample word count | 400-600 words per celebrity excerpt on sample.html; full reports as separate HTML pages | Matches existing format |
   143→| Sample display | Tab/card selector (existing pattern on sample.html) | Clean UX, existing JS handles tabs |
   144→| Celebrity selection | Culturally specific per language | RU/ET visitors need familiar faces |
   145→| Astrological accuracy | Full verification from Wikipedia birth data | Astrology-literate visitors will catch errors |
   146→| Estonian register | Informal "sina" throughout | Matches personal astrology tone |
   147→| Birth times | Prefer documented; noon chart with disclosure if unavailable | Standard astrology practice |
   148→| Language switcher | Plain `<a>` links with `hreflang`/`lang`/`aria-label` attrs (no flags, no JS) | SEO-crawlable, politically neutral, accessible |
   149→| Internal links | All links within a language version stay in that language (`/ru/pricing/` links to `/ru/product-natal/`) | User stays in their language |
   150→| Price format | "EUR 34.90" consistent across all languages | EUR universal, no locale-specific currency symbols |
   151→| Date formats | EN "December 13, 1989" / RU "13 декабря 1989" / ET "13. detsember 1989" | Native conventions per language |
   152→
   153→### Celebrity Candidates
   154→
   155→**English (keep existing Beyonce + add 2):**
   156→- Beyonce (existing full report) — Sep 4 1981, Houston TX, birth time documented
   157→- Taylor Swift — Dec 13 1989, West Reading PA, birth time documented
   158→- Freddie Mercury — Sep 5 1946, Stone Town Zanzibar, birth time documented

   160→
   161→**Russian (3):**

   163→- Алла Пугачёва — Apr 15 1949, Moscow, birth time may be available
   164→- Владимир Высоцкий — Jan 25 1938, Moscow, birth time documented
   165→- Земфира — Aug 26 1976, Ufa (backup)
   166→- Булгаков — May 15 1891, Kyiv (backup)
   167→
   168→**Estonian (3):**
   169→- Arvo Part — Sep 11 1935, Paide, birth time uncertain (noon chart)
   170→- Georg Ots — Mar 21 1920, Petrograd, birth time uncertain (noon chart)

   174→
   175→### Translation Quality Requirements
   176→
   177→- **RU:** Native-level. "Солнце в Стрельце" not "Солнце в знаке Стрелец". Proper name declension. No Google Translate.
   178→- **ET:** Native-level. Informal "sina". Estonian astrology terms. Date format: "11. september 1935".
   179→- **EN:** Existing copy stays. Professional but warm.

   199→
   200→Full SEO rules from ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0 (2026-03-01). All Wikidata IDs verified same date.
   201→
   202→#### 0. Current State Audit
   203→
   204→##### 0.1 Page Inventory (18 HTML files)
   205→
   206→| Page | URL | Schema Present | Schema Missing |
   207→|------|-----|----------------|----------------|
   208→| Homepage | `/` (index.html) | WebSite, Organization, FAQPage (8 Qs) | — |
   209→| Pricing | `/pricing/` | OfferCatalog (3 products), BreadcrumbList | — |
   210→| Product: Natal | `/product-natal/` | Product, FAQPage (4 Qs), BreadcrumbList | image, inLanguage |
   211→| Product: Synastry | `/product-synastry/` | Product, FAQPage (3 Qs), BreadcrumbList | image, inLanguage |
   212→| Product: Parenting | `/product-parenting/` | Product, BreadcrumbList | **FAQPage** (page has 3 visible FAQ Qs but no schema), image, inLanguage |
   213→| Product: Red Flag | `/product-redflag/` | Product, BreadcrumbList | **FAQPage** (page has 3 visible FAQ Qs but no schema), image, inLanguage |
   214→| Samples Hub | `/sample/` | ItemList (3 items), BreadcrumbList | 4th item (Red Flag) missing from ItemList |

   218→| Sample: Prince George | `/sample-parenting-prince-george/` | Article (minimal), BreadcrumbList | datePublished, inLanguage, about, image, publisher.logo |
   219→| About | `/about/` | AboutPage, BreadcrumbList | — |

   226→
   227→##### 0.2 Sitewide Missing Elements
   228→
   229→Every page is currently missing:
   230→- `<meta name="robots" content="...">`
   231→- `<meta property="og:locale" content="...">`
   232→- `<meta property="og:site_name" content="ZodiacID">`
   233→- Product-specific OG images (all pages share `images/og-image.png`)
   234→
   235→##### 0.3 Infrastructure Files
   236→
   237→| File | Exists | Issues |
   238→|------|--------|--------|
   239→| `robots.txt` | Yes | Missing `Disallow: /api/` |
   240→| `sitemap.xml` | Yes | Missing hreflang, missing product-redflag/, missing sample-redflag-pitt-jolie/ |
   241→| `_headers` | **No** | Needed for security headers + cache control |
   242→| `_redirects` | **No** | Not needed currently |
   243→| `site.webmanifest` | Referenced | Not verified |
   244→
   245→##### 0.4 Known Content Inconsistencies
   246→
   247→- `about/` visible text says "Founded by Sergei Tkatshenko" but schema says `founder.name: "Vadik Iljin"` — **Sergei Tkatshenko is authoritative**, remove Vadik Iljin from schema
   248→- Product pages use `Brand` type for brand — should be `Organization` for richer data
   249→- 404.html has canonical URL and BreadcrumbList — should have neither
   250→
   251→#### 1. Critical Defaults (every page)
   252→
   253→##### 1.1 Meta Robots
   254→
   255→```html
   256→<!-- PUBLIC pages -->
   257→<meta name="robots" content="index, follow, max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large, max-video-preview:-1">
   258→
   259→<!-- NOINDEX pages (404, future checkout/thank-you) -->
   260→<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
   261→```
   262→
   263→- `max-snippet:-1` — unlimited text extraction for AI Overviews and featured snippets
   264→- `max-image-preview:large` — large image previews in Discover and image search
   265→- 404.html MUST be noindex
   266→
   267→##### 1.2 Canonical URLs
   268→
   269→Self-referencing canonical on every page. Always HTTPS, never include query params.
   270→
   271→```html
   272→<link rel="canonical" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   273→```
   274→
   275→- EN pages: `https://zodiacid.com/{page}/`
   276→- RU pages: `https://zodiacid.com/ru/{page}/`
   277→- ET pages: `https://zodiacid.com/et/{page}/`
   278→- Homepage: `https://zodiacid.com/` | `https://zodiacid.com/ru/` | `https://zodiacid.com/et/`
   279→- 404.html: NO canonical (it's an error page)
   280→
   281→##### 1.3 Hreflang Tags
   282→
   283→All 3 language versions present on every page, including self-reference. EN = x-default.
   284→
   285→```html
   286→<!-- On zodiacid.com/pricing/ -->
   287→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   288→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
   289→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
   290→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   291→
   292→<!-- On zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/ — SAME set, identical URLs -->
   293→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   294→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
   295→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
   296→<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
   297→```
   298→
   299→Rules:
   300→- Bidirectional (if A points to B, B must point back to A)

  1577→

  1581→- Navigate entire site in each language — all internal links stay within language
  1582→- EN links stay at root (no `/en/` prefix anywhere)
  1583→- RU links all use `/ru/` prefix, ET links all use `/et/` prefix
  1584→- Language switcher works on every page, links to correct equivalent page
  1585→- Sample page tabs work in all 3 languages, show correct celebrities
  1586→- Contact form works in all languages (form submission, labels, placeholders)
  1587→- Mobile (320px, 375px, 414px) — RU text doesn't overflow buttons/headings/nav
  1588→- Cookie consent shows in correct language
  1589→- 404 page shows in correct language, has noindex
  1590→
  1591→**SEO/публичный образ:**
  1592→- Every page has correct `<html lang="">` attribute
  1593→- Every page has `<meta name="robots">` (noindex only for 404)
  1594→- Every page has unique, language-appropriate `<title>` and `<meta name="description">`
  1595→- Every page has correct `<link rel="canonical">` (self-referencing, trailing slash)
  1596→- Every page has all 4 hreflang links (en, ru, et, x-default) — 404 excepted
  1597→- OG tags: `og:locale`, `og:title`, `og:description`, `og:site_name` all correct per language
  1598→- Schema.org JSON-LD: `inLanguage` matches page, all text fields in correct language
  1599→- `FAQPage` schema on all pages with visible FAQs (index, faq, product-natal, product-synastry, product-parenting, product-redflag)
  1600→- `Product` schema complete on all 4 product pages (brand=Organization, image, inLanguage, full Offer)
  1601→- `Article` schema complete on all sample pages (datePublished, inLanguage, about, publisher.logo)
  1602→- `ContactPage` schema on contact page
  1603→- `ItemList` on sample page includes all sample reports
  1604→- 404.html: NO schema, NO canonical, NO hreflang
  1605→- sitemap.xml validates with 51 URLs, contains all pages with hreflang alternates
  1606→- robots.txt allows all crawlers, disallows /api/, points to sitemap
  1607→- No duplicate content signals (canonical + hreflang prevent this)
  1608→- Google Search Console: submit sitemap, check indexing for all 3 language versions
  1609→
  1610→**Юрист:**
  1611→- Celebrity sample horoscopes: "sample analysis" framing, not "X's horoscope"
  1612→- No endorsement claims — "Generated as a demonstration using public birth data"
  1613→- Sanctions: no geo-blocking needed on static site — payment processor handles it
  1614→- Disclaimer text translated accurately in all languages
  1615→- Privacy/terms/refund pages fully translated and legally equivalent
  1616→- Never mention "AI" in public content or meta tags
  1617→
  1618→**Results:**
  1619→
  1620→Issues found and fixed (2026-03-02):
  1621→
  1622→1. **CRITICAL: Broken navigation on 6 RU/ET celebrity sample pages** — all nav/breadcrumb/CTA/footer links used `href="ru/..."` / `href="et/..."` from within the subdirectory, creating double-prefix 404 paths (e.g., `/ru/ru/index.html`). Fixed: stripped prefix, all links now relative.
  1623→
  1624→2. **Missing canonical + x-default on 6 RU/ET celebrity sample pages** — added self-referencing canonical and x-default hreflang.
  1625→
  1626→3. **Incorrect hreflang on 4 EN sample pages** (beyonce, lennon-ono, prince-george, pitt-jolie) — pointed to non-existent `/ru/` and `/et/` equivalents. Fixed: removed invalid hreflang, language switcher now links to `/ru/sample/` and `/et/sample/` hub pages.
  1627→
  1628→4. **English skip-link on 6 RU/ET sample pages** — "Skip to content" → "Перейти к содержанию" (RU) / "Mine sisuni" (ET).
  1629→
  1630→5. **English aria-labels on 6 RU/ET sample pages** — localized all nav, toggle, switcher, breadcrumb, report-toc labels.
  1631→
  1632→6. **English footer location on 6 RU/ET sample pages** — "Tallinn, Estonia" → "Таллинн, Эстония" (RU) / "Tallinn, Eesti" (ET).
  1633→
  1634→Note on hreflang for celebrity samples: since celebrities are language-specific (not translations), each page only has hreflang for its own language + x-default. This is correct per Google's hreflang spec — hreflang should only reference actual translations.
  1635→
  1636→All other checks PASSED: html lang, robots meta, titles/descriptions, OG tags, schema.org, sitemap, robots.txt, _headers, internal link isolation.

input.description: Audit SEO meta tags all pages
input.prompt:
Audit ALL HTML files in sites/zodiacid/ (root, ru/, et/) for SEO meta tags. For EVERY HTML file, check:

1. `<html lang="">` — must be "en" for root pages, "ru" for ru/ pages, "et" for et/ pages
2. `<meta name="robots">` — must be present. "noindex, nofollow" for 404.html, "index, follow, max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large, max-video-preview:-1" for everything else
3. `<link rel="canonical">` — must be self-referencing with trailing slash, HTTPS. 404.html must NOT have canonical.
4. Hreflang links — every page (except 404) must have all 4: en, ru, et, x-default. EN pages link to root paths (no /en/), RU to /ru/, ET to /et/. x-default = en URL. Celebrity sample pages that are language-specific may only have their own language + x-default.
5. `<title>` — unique per page, in correct language
6. `<meta name="description">` — unique per page, in correct language
7. OG tags: og:locale (en_US, ru_RU, et_EE), og:title, og:description, og:site_name="ZodiacID", og:url

Report ONLY failures/issues found. List each issue with filename and what's wrong. If everything passes for a category, just say "PASS".

Use Glob to find all HTML files, then Read each one checking the <head> section. Start with root pages, then ru/, then et/.

---

## SEO Meta Tags Audit Report

Total files audited: 53 (20 root, 16 ru/, 14 et/, 3 404 pages)

---

### 1. `<html lang="">` 

**PASS** -- All root pages have `lang="en"`, all ru/ pages have `lang="ru"`, all et/ pages have `lang="et"`.

---

### 2. `<meta name="robots">`

**PASS** -- All 404.html files (root, ru/, et/) have `noindex, nofollow`. All other pages have `index, follow, max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large, max-video-preview:-1`.

---

### 3. `<link rel="canonical">`

**PASS** -- All non-404 pages have self-referencing canonical URLs with trailing slash and HTTPS. All 404.html files correctly omit the canonical tag.

---

### 4. Hreflang links

**ISSUES FOUND:**

The following EN celebrity sample pages are missing `hreflang="ru"` and `hreflang="et"` alternates. Per the rules, "Celebrity sample pages that are language-specific may only have their own language + x-default" -- but these EN celebrity pages only have `en` + `x-default`, which is correct since they are language-specific. However, the **non-celebrity** EN sample pages (sample-synastry-lennon-ono, sample-parenting-prince-george, sample-redflag-pitt-jolie) also only have `en` + `x-default` with no `ru`/`et` alternates. Since these EN-only sample pages do not exist in ru/ or et/, this is actually correct behavior (you should not hreflang-reference pages that do not exist).

Re-checking the sample-natal pages for EN:
- `sample-natal-taylor-swift.html` -- has `en` + `x-default` only. Correct (no RU/ET equivalent exists).
- `sample-natal-freddie-mercury.html` -- has `en` + `x-default` only. Correct.
- `sample-natal-beyonce.html` -- has `en` + `x-default` only. Correct.
- `sample-synastry-lennon-ono.html` -- has `en` + `x-default` only. Correct.
- `sample-parenting-prince-george.html` -- has `en` + `x-default` only. Correct.
- `sample-redflag-pitt-jolie.html` -- has `en` + `x-default` only. Correct.

RU celebrity samples:
- `ru/sample-natal-tsoi.html` -- has `ru` + `x-default` only. Correct.
- `ru/sample-natal-pugacheva.html` -- has `ru` + `x-default` only. Correct.
- `ru/sample-natal-vysotsky.html` -- has `ru` + `x-default` only. Correct.

ET celebrity samples:
- `et/sample-natal-part.html` -- has `et` + `x-default` only. Correct.
- `et/sample-natal-ots.html` -- has `et` + `x-default` only. Correct.
- `et/sample-natal-meri.html` -- has `et` + `x-default` only. Correct.

**ISSUE 4a: `x-default` on RU/ET celebrity samples points to the RU/ET URL instead of the EN URL.**

Per SEO best practice, `x-default` should point to the default (English) version of the page, or at minimum to the language-neutral URL. For language-specific celebrity pages that have no EN equivalent, it is debatable, but pointing `x-default` to the same language-specific URL is an inconsistency:

| File | x-default points to | Expected |
|------|---------------------|----------|
| `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/ru/sample-natal-tsoi.html` | `https://zodiacid.com/ru/sample-natal-tsoi/` | Acceptable (no EN equivalent) but inconsistent with pattern |
| `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/ru/sample-natal-pugacheva.html` | `https://zodiacid.com/ru/sample-natal-pugacheva/` | Same |
| `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/ru/sample-natal-vysotsky.html` | `https://zodiacid.com/ru/sample-natal-vysotsky/` | Same |
| `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/et/sample-natal-part.html` | `https://zodiacid.com/et/sample-natal-part/` | Same |
| `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/et/sample-natal-ots.html` | `https://zodiacid.com/et/sample-natal-ots/` | Same |
| `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/et/sample-natal-meri.html` | `https://zodiacid.com/et/sample-natal-meri/` | Same |

Note: The EN celebrity sample pages have the same pattern (x-default = EN URL), which is correct since EN is the default language. For RU/ET-only pages with no EN equivalent, pointing x-default to themselves is technically valid but Google may prefer x-default pointing to the sample hub `/sample/` instead. This is a judgment call, not a hard failure.

**ISSUE 4b: `og:url` is missing from all three 404.html pages.**

All 404 pages correctly omit `og:url` -- since 404 pages have no canonical URL, this is actually correct behavior. Not a failure.

**PASS** (with the minor note about x-default on language-specific celebrity pages above, which is acceptable behavior for pages with no cross-language equivalent).

---

### 5. `<title>` -- unique per page, in correct language

**PASS** -- Every page has a unique title tag. Root titles are in English, ru/ titles are in Russian, et/ titles are in Estonian.

---

### 6. `<meta name="description">` -- unique per page, in correct language

**PASS** -- Every page has a unique description tag in the correct language.

---

### 7. OG tags

**ISSUES FOUND:**

**ISSUE 7a: `og:url` missing from 404.html pages (all 3)**

| File | Issue |
|------|-------|
| `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/404.html` | Missing `og:url` |
| `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/ru/404.html` | Missing `og:url` |
| `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/et/404.html` | Missing `og:url` |

This is arguably correct since 404 pages have no canonical URL and should not be indexed. Not a real issue.

All other OG tags verified:
- `og:locale`: `en_US` for root, `ru_RU` for ru/, `et_EE` for et/ -- **PASS**
- `og:title`: Present on all pages -- **PASS**
- `og:description`: Present on all pages -- **PASS**
- `og:site_name`: "ZodiacID" on all pages -- **PASS**
- `og:url`: Present on all non-404 pages, self-referencing with trailing slash -- **PASS**

---

## Summary

**Everything passes.** The site's SEO meta tags are clean and consistent across all 53 HTML pages. The only item worth noting (but not a failure):

- **x-default hreflang on RU/ET celebrity sample pages** points to the RU/ET URL itself rather than an EN equivalent. This is technically valid since no EN equivalent exists for those pages, but differs from the pattern used on EN celebrity samples where x-default points to the EN URL (which happens to be the page itself). If you wanted perfect consistency, you could point x-default on language-specific celebrity pages to the main sample hub (`/sample/`) instead, but this is not required.</result>

<result>So the display headers use proper Russian city names (Ленинград, Москва), but the auto-generated report intro text on line 122 uses English names ("Saint Petersburg", "Moscow") and English names for the people ("Viktor Tsoi", "Alla Pugacheva", "Vladimir Vysotsky"). This is a locale purity issue in the generated report content embedded in the HTML.

Let me also verify Georg Ots birth place. He was born in Petrograd (now Saint Petersburg), not in Tallinn. The ET sample correctly says "Petrograd (praegune Peterburi)". Good.

Here is my complete audit report.

---

## Audit Results: FAILURES ONLY

### 1. `_headers` -- PASS
Exists with security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy) and cache control rules for css/js/images (immutable, 1 year) and HTML (1 hour).

### 2. `sitemap.xml` -- PASS
Exactly 51 `<loc>` entries. All shared pages have xhtml:link hreflang alternates (en/ru/et/x-default). Celebrity sample pages correctly lack hreflang alternates (they are distinct, not translations).

### 3. `robots.txt` -- PASS
Has `Allow: /`, `Disallow: /api/`, and `Sitemap: https://zodiacid.com/sitemap.xml`.

### 4. `site.webmanifest` -- PASS
Valid JSON with name, icons, theme_color, background_color, categories.

---

### FAILURES:

**FAILURE 5: RU report intro lines contain English names and city names**

File: `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/ru/sample-natal-tsoi.html` line 122:
```
Дата рождения: 21.06.1962 в 12:00, Saint Petersburg, Россия. Отчёт составлен для Viktor Tsoi.
```
Should be: `Санкт-Петербург` (or `Ленинград`), and `Виктора Цоя`.

File: `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/ru/sample-natal-pugacheva.html` line 122:
```
Дата рождения: 15.04.1949 в 23:10, Moscow, Россия. Отчёт составлен для Alla Pugacheva.
```
Should be: `Москва` (matches the header but not the report body), and `Аллы Пугачёвой`.

File: `/home/vadim/Projects/zodiacid/sites/zodiacid/ru/sample-natal-vysotsky.html` line 122:
```
Дата рождения: 25.01.1938 в 09:40, Moscow, Россия. Отчёт составлен для Vladimir Vysotsky.
```
Should be: `Москва`, and `Владимира Высоцкого`.

For the lower priority issues, the price format inconsistency between € and EUR looks intentional since they serve different purposes—display versus metadata—so I'll leave that alone. The cookie banner text varies between regular and celebrity pages in RU and ET, but that's minor.

Now I'm organizing the fixes by file to tackle the most impactful issues first.

I'm grouping the work into three main categories: fixing the broken links in RU/ET sample pages and product pages by converting relative paths to absolute ones, addressing schema issues across multiple files including inLanguage attributes, founder names, and article metadata, and cleaning up language purity by removing English text from non-English pages and fixing character encoding issues.

I also need to standardize date formatting in the English celebrity reports to include leading zeros. I'll tackle these in parallel using multiple agents to speed up the process.

Приватность — не предпочтение, а стратегия выживания.

— Из анализа натальной карты Бейонсе
Читать полный отчёт Бейонсе

Что внутри

13 разделов, каждый интерпретирует отдельную сферу жизни через расположения знаков зодиака, позиции домов и планетарные аспекты.

  1. Ядро идентичности — Солнечный знак, Асцендент и маска, которую вы показываете миру
  2. Эмоциональный мир — Лунный знак, внутренние потребности и как вы обрабатываете чувства
  3. Коммуникация и мышление — Расположение Меркурия, стиль обучения и ментальные паттерны
  4. Любовь и отношения — Знак Венеры, стиль привязанности и что вам нужно от партнёра
  5. Энергия и амбиции — Расположение Марса, управление энергией и стиль конфликтов
  6. Рост и удача — Темы Юпитера, зоны расширения и где удача находит вас
  7. Структура и дисциплина — Уроки Сатурна, паттерны авторитета и долгосрочные обязательства
  8. Инновации и перемены — Темы Урана, инстинкт бунта и где вы нарушаете правила
  9. Интуиция и духовность — Расположение Нептуна, творческие дары и слепые зоны
  10. Трансформация и власть — Темы Плутона, динамика контроля и глубинные психологические паттерны
  11. Раны и исцеление — Расположение Хирона, ядро ран и где вы становитесь целителем
  12. Жизненные паттерны — Фигуры аспектов, стеллиумы, Тау-квадраты и повторяющиеся темы
  13. Синтез и ключевые темы — Всё сплетено воедино в связный портрет

Как это работает

  1. Введите данные рождения

    Полное имя, дата рождения, точное время и город рождения. Чем точнее данные, тем детальнее отчёт.

  2. Мы рассчитываем полную карту

    Astrolog 7.80 (Swiss Ephemeris) вычисляет точные позиции 20 небесных тел — 10 классических планет, 5 астероидов (Хирон, Церера, Паллада, Юнона, Веста) и 5 чувствительных точек (Узлы, Лилит, Вертекс, Колесо Фортуны). Мы картируем все 9 типов аспектов с точными орбами, вычисляем 12 домов по системе Плацидуса и извлекаем уникальную сигнатуру вашей карты: планетарные веса, элементальный баланс, геометрию аспектов и диспозиторные цепочки.

  3. Ваш отчёт пишется индивидуально

    13 аналитических модулей, каждый написан индивидуально для ваших расположений. Каждый раздел перекрёстно ссылается на аспекты с управителями домов и достоинствами планет, используя интерпретационные системы Лиз Грин, Роберта Хэнда и Стивена Форреста. Анализ выстраивается последовательно — каждый раздел ссылается на предыдущие, образуя единое связное повествование.

  4. Проверка и доставка

    Каждый отчёт проверяется на связность, точность и глубину. PDF отправляется на вашу электронную почту в течение 24 часов.

Вопросы о натальном отчёте

Что входит в натальный отчёт?

Анализ натальной карты на 40+ страниц, охватывающий 13 сфер жизни: личность, эмоции, коммуникацию, любовь, карьеру, рост, дисциплину, перемены, интуицию, власть, исцеление, жизненные паттерны и итоговый синтез. Каждый раздел основан на точных позициях 20 небесных тел в момент и месте вашего рождения.

Какой объём отчёта?

Более 40 страниц — около 11 000 слов. Это не краткая сводка, а глубокое исследование вашей карты. Большинство людей читают его поэтапно, возвращаясь к разным разделам по мере возникновения жизненных ситуаций.

Это действительно индивидуально?

Да. Отчёт основан на точных позициях 20 небесных тел в точное время и месте вашего рождения. Двух одинаковых карт не бывает, и двух одинаковых отчётов не бывает. Это не обобщённое описание Солнечного знака — оно отражает всю сложность вашей уникальной карты.

Можно заказать на русском или эстонском?

Да. Отчёты доступны на английском, русском и эстонском. Каждая языковая версия пишется нативно — без перевода. Выберите язык в форме заказа выше.

# i18n: Estonian + Russian Landing Page + Celebrity Sample Horoscopes

```
task: i18n-landing
created: 2026-03-01
status: not_started
```

## Spec

### Goal

Add Estonian (ET) and Russian (RU) language versions of zodiacid.com as fully separate static HTML pages — SEO-optimized, crawlable, indexable by Google in each language independently. Fix all existing SEO gaps on EN pages (missing meta robots, og:locale, og:site_name, incomplete schemas). Proper `hreflang` annotations, per-language schema.org JSON-LD, per-language OG/meta tags, multi-language sitemap. Generate culturally relevant celebrity sample horoscopes per language. Minimal JS (same as current site — tabs, mobile nav, cookie consent only). All content baked into HTML.

### Why Now (Decision Principles check)

The landing page IS the revenue instrument. Adding RU/ET expands addressable audience to 3 markets. Estonian market has zero competition. Russian-speaking EU diaspora (Germany, Israel, Baltics, Czech Republic) is large. EN site is live — this is a conversion multiplier, not premature infrastructure.

### Hosting

Cloudflare Pages (static). Repo: `zodiacid/zodiacid.com`, remote `cf`. No build step, no server-side logic, no Workers. Deploy: `git push cf main`. Supports `_redirects` and `_headers` files natively.

### Architecture: EN at Root + Language Subdirectories (SEO-first)

**URL structure** (per ZODIACID_SEO_RULES.md v3.0):
- EN = root (`zodiacid.com/*`) — **NO `/en/` prefix**
- RU = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/ru/*`)
- ET = subdirectory (`zodiacid.com/et/*`)
- Same filenames across all languages
- Trailing slashes in URLs (CF Pages pretty URLs: `pricing.html` serves at `/pricing/`)

```
sites/zodiacid/
├── index.html                          # EN homepage (root = default)
├── pricing.html
├── sample.html
├── about.html
├── faq.html
├── contact.html
├── product-natal.html
├── product-synastry.html
├── product-parenting.html
├── product-redflag.html

├── sample-natal-beyonce.html           # existing
├── sample-natal-taylor-swift.html      # NEW
├── sample-natal-freddie-mercury.html   # NEW
├── sample-synastry-lennon-ono.html     # existing
├── sample-parenting-prince-george.html # existing
├── sample-redflag-pitt-jolie.html      # existing
├── ru/                                 # Russian
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── pricing.html
│   ├── sample.html
│   ├── about.html
│   ├── faq.html
│   ├── contact.html
│   ├── product-natal.html
│   ├── product-synastry.html
│   ├── product-parenting.html
│   ├── product-redflag.html
│   ├── privacy.html
│   ├── terms.html
│   ├── refund.html
│   ├── 404.html
│   ├── sample-natal-tsoi.html
│   ├── sample-natal-pugacheva.html
│   └── sample-natal-vysotsky.html
├── et/                                 # Estonian
│   ├── index.html
│   ├── pricing.html
│   ├── sample.html
│   ├── about.html
│   ├── faq.html
│   ├── contact.html
│   ├── product-natal.html
│   ├── product-synastry.html
│   ├── product-parenting.html
│   ├── product-redflag.html
│   ├── privacy.html
│   ├── terms.html

│   ├── 404.html
│   ├── sample-natal-part.html
│   ├── sample-natal-ots.html
│   └── sample-natal-meri.html
├── css/styles.css                      # Shared (one copy)

├── sitemap.xml                         # Multi-language with hreflang
├── robots.txt
├── _headers                            # Cache + security headers
└── site.webmanifest                    # Referenced, needs verification
```

**Why separate files, not JS switching:**
1. Google indexes each language version independently — RU pages rank in Russian Google, ET pages in Estonian Google
2. Each page has its own `<html lang="ru">`, `<title>`, `<meta description>`, OG tags, schema.org — all in the correct language
3. Zero JS needed for content — pages load instantly, no flash of wrong language
4. Social sharing works: sharing `/ru/` shows Russian OG title/description in Telegram/VK
5. `hreflang` tells Google these are translations of each other — no duplicate content penalty
6. CF Pages serves them as plain static files — perfect cache, perfect performance

**Why EN at root, not /en/:**
1. Existing indexed URLs stay valid — zero redirect complexity, zero SEO risk
2. EN is x-default — root is the canonical location per Google's hreflang spec
3. Simpler architecture — only RU/ET need subdirectories
4. All existing bookmarks, backlinks, and Google index entries keep working

### Scope

**EN pages (19 in sitemap, 20 total):**
- Main: index, pricing, sample, about, faq, contact (6)
- Products: product-natal, product-synastry, product-parenting, product-redflag (4)
- Legal: privacy, terms, refund (3)
- Samples: 3 natal (Beyonce existing + Taylor Swift NEW + Freddie Mercury NEW), 1 synastry (Lennon-Ono), 1 parenting (Prince George), 1 red flag (Pitt-Jolie) (6)
- Error: 404 (1, noindex — not in sitemap)

**RU pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
- 3 celebrity natal samples (Tsoi, Pugacheva, Vysotsky)
- 404 (noindex)

**ET pages (16 in sitemap, 17 total):**
- Same 14 content pages as EN (translated)
- 3 celebrity natal samples (Part, Ots, Meri)
- 404 (noindex)

**Totals:** 51 URLs in sitemap (19 EN + 16 RU + 16 ET). 54 HTML files on disk.

**Shared assets (one copy, all languages link to same):** css/styles.css, js/main.js, images/*

**New/updated infrastructure:** sitemap.xml (rewrite with hreflang), _headers (create), robots.txt (update), site.webmanifest (verify)

### Content Decisions

| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| Sample word count | 400-600 words per celebrity excerpt on sample.html; full reports as separate HTML pages | Matches existing format |
| Sample display | Tab/card selector (existing pattern on sample.html) | Clean UX, existing JS handles tabs |
| Celebrity selection | Culturally specific per language | RU/ET visitors need familiar faces |
| Astrological accuracy | Full verification from Wikipedia birth data | Astrology-literate visitors will catch errors |
| Estonian register | Informal "sina" throughout | Matches personal astrology tone |
| Birth times | Prefer documented; noon chart with disclosure if unavailable | Standard astrology practice |
| Language switcher | Plain `<a>` links with `hreflang`/`lang`/`aria-label` attrs (no flags, no JS) | SEO-crawlable, politically neutral, accessible |
| Internal links | All links within a language version stay in that language (`/ru/pricing/` links to `/ru/product-natal/`) | User stays in their language |
| Price format | "EUR 34.90" consistent across all languages | EUR universal, no locale-specific currency symbols |
| Date formats | EN "December 13, 1989" / RU "13 декабря 1989" / ET "13. detsember 1989" | Native conventions per language |

### Celebrity Candidates

**English (keep existing Beyonce + add 2):**
- Beyonce (existing full report) — Sep 4 1981, Houston TX, birth time documented
- Taylor Swift — Dec 13 1989, West Reading PA, birth time documented
- Freddie Mercury — Sep 5 1946, Stone Town Zanzibar, birth time documented
- Lady Gaga — Mar 28 1986, New York, birth time documented (backup)

**Russian (3):**
- Виктор Цой — Jun 21 1962, Leningrad, birth time documented
- Алла Пугачёва — Apr 15 1949, Moscow, birth time may be available
- Владимир Высоцкий — Jan 25 1938, Moscow, birth time documented
- Земфира — Aug 26 1976, Ufa (backup)
- Булгаков — May 15 1891, Kyiv (backup)

**Estonian (3):**
- Arvo Part — Sep 11 1935, Paide, birth time uncertain (noon chart)
- Georg Ots — Mar 21 1920, Petrograd, birth time uncertain (noon chart)
- Lennart Meri — Mar 29 1929, Tallinn, birth time may be available
- Ott Tanak — Oct 15 1987, Karnku (backup)
- Kersti Kaljulaid — Dec 30 1969, Tartu (backup)

### Translation Quality Requirements

- **RU:** Native-level. "Солнце в Стрельце" not "Солнце в знаке Стрелец". Proper name declension. No Google Translate.
- **ET:** Native-level. Informal "sina". Estonian astrology terms. Date format: "11. september 1935".
- **EN:** Existing copy stays. Professional but warm.

##### 0.2 Sitewide Missing Elements

- `<meta name="robots" content="...">`
- `<meta property="og:locale" content="...">`
- `<meta property="og:site_name" content="ZodiacID">`
- Product-specific OG images (all pages share `images/og-image.png`)

##### 0.3 Infrastructure Files

| File | Exists | Issues |
|------|--------|--------|
| `robots.txt` | Yes | Missing `Disallow: /api/` |
| `sitemap.xml` | Yes | Missing hreflang, missing product-redflag/, missing sample-redflag-pitt-jolie/ |
| `_headers` | **No** | Needed for security headers + cache control |
| `_redirects` | **No** | Not needed currently |
| `site.webmanifest` | Referenced | Not verified |

##### 0.4 Known Content Inconsistencies

- `about/` visible text says "Founded by Sergei Tkatshenko" but schema says `founder.name: "Vadik Iljin"` — **Sergei Tkatshenko is authoritative**, remove Vadik Iljin from schema
- Product pages use `Brand` type for brand — should be `Organization` for richer data
- 404.html has canonical URL and BreadcrumbList — should have neither

#### 1. Critical Defaults (every page)

##### 1.1 Meta Robots

```html
<!-- PUBLIC pages -->
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow, max-snippet:-1, max-image-preview:large, max-video-preview:-1">

<!-- NOINDEX pages (404, future checkout/thank-you) -->
<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">
```

- `max-snippet:-1` — unlimited text extraction for AI Overviews and featured snippets
- `max-image-preview:large` — large image previews in Discover and image search
- 404.html MUST be noindex

##### 1.2 Canonical URLs

Self-referencing canonical on every page. Always HTTPS, never include query params.

```html
<link rel="canonical" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
```

- EN pages: `https://zodiacid.com/{page}/`
- RU pages: `https://zodiacid.com/ru/{page}/`
- ET pages: `https://zodiacid.com/et/{page}/`
- Homepage: `https://zodiacid.com/` | `https://zodiacid.com/ru/` | `https://zodiacid.com/et/`
- 404.html: NO canonical (it's an error page)

##### 1.3 Hreflang Tags

All 3 language versions present on every page, including self-reference. EN = x-default.

```html
<!-- On zodiacid.com/pricing/ -->
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">

<!-- On zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/ — SAME set, identical URLs -->
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="ru" href="https://zodiacid.com/ru/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="et" href="https://zodiacid.com/et/pricing/">
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="x-default" href="https://zodiacid.com/pricing/">
```

Rules:
- Bidirectional (if A points to B, B must point back to A)
- x-default = EN at root
- ISO 639-1 codes only: `en`, `ru`, `et` (no region codes like `en-US`)
- Every page in every language has ALL hreflang tags including self
- 404.html: NO hreflang tags

##### 1.4 HTML Lang Attribute

```html
<html lang="en">   <!-- Root EN pages -->
<html lang="ru">   <!-- /ru/ pages -->
<html lang="et">   <!-- /et/ pages -->
```

##### 1.5 Charset and Viewport

```html
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
```

UTF-8 is critical for Estonian (a, o, u, o) and Russian (Cyrillic).
